/usr/bin/ar qc libbinaryatlas_core.a CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/core/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/core/binary_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/core/error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/core/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/format/elf_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/disasm/disassembler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/analysis/graph_algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/analysis/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/analysis/recovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/graph/dot_exporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/heuristics/detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/output/json_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/output/terminal_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryatlas_core.dir/src/util/file_io.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbinaryatlas_core.a
